tools.name: getHoldings
tools.description: Get a wallet's NFT holdings for registered collections (Mibera first), with per-token tokenIds and a completeness envelope (as_of_block, holder_count, source, complete) that proves the result is complete as of a block.

tools.name: getNftsForOwner
tools.description: Get the paginated list of NFTs (with full metadata: name, image, attributes) owned by a wallet for a given contract. Supports pageSize + pageKey cursoring.

tools.name: getNftMetadata
tools.description: Get the metadata document (name, description, image, attributes) for a single token id of a contract, sourced from the codex.

tools.name: getProfilePicture
tools.description: Get the best-available profile image URL for a wallet across registered collections (Mibera first); returns imageUrl: null when the wallet holds nothing renderable.
